title: How is the process of rendering a view or widget in monday?
excerpt: Hello everyone. I have a question. How many times do you render the view of a table? I’m building a view to be included in monday, but the same component is rendered many times side by side, rather than one on top of the…

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone. I have a question. How many times do you render the view of a table? I’m building a view to be included in monday, but the same component is rendered many times side by side, rather than one on top of the other. when I try it outside in the browser it works very well.

it’s not an API problem. as it returns the correct information. this is how it is rendered in monday (image1).

image11768×616 72.7 KB

and so on in the browser.

image21811×692 71.3 KB

my table only contains two city.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @isrraelRios !

If you want to send us an email containing the script you are using for the view and if you are uploading the file or using a custom URL, we can take a closer look into this.

The email address is appsupport@monday.com

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
